case_title: JOHN KENNEY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-07-2016 CONTINUED TO OCT-19-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100005001) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KENNEY, JOHN
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KENNEY, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-07-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-06-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-15-2016

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-29-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-19-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSOCIATION OF ATTORNEYS, (TRANSACTION ID # 16273072): BURNS, WILLIAM FRANCIS ADDED AS ATTORNEY FOR KENNEY, JOHN
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-29-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
